entries.en-US: # Measuring text in Remotion
entries.zh-Hans: # 在 Remotion 中测量文本

entries.en-US: ## Prerequisites
entries.zh-Hans: ## 先决条件

entries.en-US: Install @remotion/layout-utils if it is not already installed:
entries.zh-Hans: 如果尚未安装，请安装 @remotion/layout-utils：

entries.en-US:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/layout-utils # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/layout-utils # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/layout-utils # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/layout-utils # If project uses pnpm
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/layout-utils # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/layout-utils # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/layout-utils # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/layout-utils # If project uses pnpm
```

entries.en-US: ## Measuring text dimensions
entries.zh-Hans: ## 测量文本尺寸

entries.en-US: Use `measureText()` to calculate the width and height of text:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `measureText()` 来计算文本的宽度和高度：

entries.en-US: Results are cached - duplicate calls return the cached result.
entries.zh-Hans: 结果会被缓存 - 重复调用将返回缓存的结果。

entries.en-US: ## Fitting text to a width
entries.zh-Hans: ## 使文本适应宽度

entries.en-US: Use `fitText()` to find the optimal font size for a container:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `fitText()` 来为容器找到最佳字体大小：

entries.en-US: ## Checking text overflow
entries.zh-Hans: ## 检查文本溢出

entries.en-US: Use `fillTextBox()` to check if text exceeds a box:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `fillTextBox()` 来检查文本是否超出框体：

entries.en-US: ## Best practices
entries.zh-Hans: ## 最佳实践

entries.en-US: **Load fonts first:** Only call measurement functions after fonts are loaded.
entries.zh-Hans: **首先加载字体：** 只有在字体加载完成后才调用测量函数。

entries.en-US: **Use validateFontIsLoaded:** Catch font loading issues early:
entries.zh-Hans: **使用 validateFontIsLoaded：** 及早发现字体加载问题：

entries.en-US: **Match font properties:** Use the same properties for measurement and rendering:
entries.zh-Hans: **匹配字体属性：** 在测量和渲染时使用相同的属性：

entries.en-US: **Avoid padding and border:** Use `outline` instead of `border` to prevent layout differences:
entries.zh-Hans: **避免内边距和边框：** 使用 `outline` 而不是 `border` 以防止布局差异：
